meaning: n.粒子,点,极小量,微粒,质点,小品词,语气
examples: A proton is an elementary particle of matter that possesses a positive charge.
Particle physicists and astronomers collaborate often.
A fundamental particle is created when three ribbons are joined in a "plait".
If it is twisted in the opposite direction, the particle has the opposite charge.
One of the intriguing discoveries of 2011 came the giant particle accelerator in Switzerland.
